containerDefinitions.name: config-init
command:
set -e
mkdir -p \
    /cfg/prometheus \
    /cfg/tempo \
    /cfg/mimir \
    /cfg/grafana/datasources \
    /cfg/grafana/dashboards

cat > /cfg/prometheus/prometheus.yml << 'PROMEOF'
global:
  scrape_interval:     15s
  scrape_timeout:      10s
  evaluation_interval: 15s

  external_labels:
    cluster: aeroftp-cluster
    env:     production

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Remote-write to Mimir (co-located in the same ECS task, localhost)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
remote_write:
  - url: http://localhost:9009/api/v1/push
    queue_config:
      max_samples_per_send: 2000
      max_shards:           10
      capacity:             5000

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Static scrape targets: aeroftp nodes 172.16.32.20 – 172.16.32.39
# port 9090 → aeroftp application metrics (libunftp / aeroftp)
# port 9100 → node_exporter system metrics
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
scrape_configs:
  - job_name: aeroftp
    static_configs:
      - targets:
          - '172.16.32.20:9090'
          - '172.16.32.21:9090'
          - '172.16.32.22:9090'
          - '172.16.32.23:9090'
          - '172.16.32.24:9090'
          - '172.16.32.25:9090'
          - '172.16.32.26:9090'
          - '172.16.32.27:9090'
          - '172.16.32.28:9090'
          - '172.16.32.29:9090'
          - '172.16.32.30:9090'
          - '172.16.32.31:9090'
          - '172.16.32.32:9090'
          - '172.16.32.33:9090'
          - '172.16.32.34:9090'
          - '172.16.32.35:9090'
          - '172.16.32.36:9090'
          - '172.16.32.37:9090'
          - '172.16.32.38:9090'
          - '172.16.32.39:9090'
        labels:
          subnet: '172.16.32.0/24'

    relabel_configs:
      # Derive a short instance label from the host IP (drops the port)
      - source_labels: [__address__]
        regex:         '([^:]+):\d+'
        target_label:  instance
        replacement:   '$1'

  - job_name: node-exporter
    static_configs:
      - targets:
          - '172.16.32.20:9100'
          - '172.16.32.21:9100'
          - '172.16.32.22:9100'
          - '172.16.32.23:9100'
          - '172.16.32.24:9100'
          - '172.16.32.25:9100'
          - '172.16.32.26:9100'
          - '172.16.32.27:9100'
          - '172.16.32.28:9100'
          - '172.16.32.29:9100'
          - '172.16.32.30:9100'
          - '172.16.32.31:9100'
          - '172.16.32.32:9100'
          - '172.16.32.33:9100'
          - '172.16.32.34:9100'
          - '172.16.32.35:9100'
          - '172.16.32.36:9100'
          - '172.16.32.37:9100'
          - '172.16.32.38:9100'
          - '172.16.32.39:9100'
        labels:
          subnet: '172.16.32.0/24'

    relabel_configs:
      - source_labels: [__address__]
        regex:         '([^:]+):\d+'
        target_label:  instance
        replacement:   '$1'

PROMEOF

cat > /cfg/tempo/tempo.yaml << 'TEMPOEOF'
# Grafana Tempo — monolithic (single-binary) mode
# All containers in the same ECS task share the same network namespace
# (awsvpc mode), so every service is reachable via localhost.

server:
  http_listen_port: 3200
  grpc_listen_port: 9095
  log_level:        info

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Trace receivers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
distributor:
  receivers:
    otlp:
      protocols:
        grpc:
          endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4317
        http:
          endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4318
    zipkin:
      endpoint: 0.0.0.0:9411

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Ingester
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
ingester:
  max_block_duration: 5m   # cut a block every 5 minutes in single-process mode

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Storage — ephemeral local storage suitable for Fargate tasks.
# For persistence across task restarts mount an EFS path here.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
storage:
  trace:
    backend: local
    local:
      path: /tmp/tempo/blocks
    wal:
      path: /tmp/tempo/wal

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Compaction
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
compactor:
  compaction:
    block_retention: 48h

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Metrics generator — remote-writes span-derived metrics to Mimir
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
metrics_generator:
  registry:
    external_labels:
      cluster: aeroftp-cluster
  storage:
    path:       /tmp/tempo/generator/wal
    remote_write:
      - url: http://localhost:9009/api/v1/push

overrides:
  defaults:
    metrics_generator:
      processors:
        - service-graphs
        - span-metrics

TEMPOEOF

cat > /cfg/mimir/mimir.yaml << 'MIMIREOF'
# Grafana Mimir — monolithic (single-process) mode
# Runs all components in one binary; suitable for a single ECS task.
# For a production deployment consider the microservices or read-write split
# deployment modes and replace the local filesystem backend with S3.

target: all
multitenancy_enabled: false

server:
  http_listen_port: 9009
  grpc_listen_port: 9096
  log_level:        info

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Common storage — ephemeral local filesystem.
# Replace with an S3 backend for durability across task restarts.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
common:
  storage:
    backend: filesystem
    filesystem:
      dir: /tmp/mimir/data

blocks_storage:
  backend: filesystem
  filesystem:
    dir: /tmp/mimir/data/tsdb
  bucket_store:
    sync_dir: /tmp/mimir/tsdb-sync
  tsdb:
    dir: /tmp/mimir/tsdb

compactor:
  data_dir: /tmp/mimir/compactor
  sharding_ring:
    kvstore:
      store: memberlist

distributor:
  ring:
    instance_addr: 127.0.0.1
    kvstore:
      store: memberlist

ingester:
  ring:
    instance_addr:      127.0.0.1
    kvstore:
      store:            memberlist
    replication_factor: 1

ruler_storage:
  backend: filesystem
  filesystem:
    dir: /tmp/mimir/rules

store_gateway:
  sharding_ring:
    replication_factor: 1

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Memberlist (gossip) — single-node, no peers needed in monolithic mode
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
memberlist:
  join_members: []

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Limits — sensible defaults for a monitoring sidecar task
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
limits:
  ingestion_rate:             30000
  ingestion_burst_size:       50000
  max_global_series_per_user: 500000
  compactor_blocks_retention_period: 30d

MIMIREOF

cat > /cfg/grafana/datasources/datasources.yaml << 'GRAFANAEOF'
apiVersion: 1

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Datasources auto-provisioned on Grafana startup.
# All services are co-located in the same ECS task (awsvpc), so every
# backend is reachable via localhost.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
datasources:

  - name:      Prometheus
    type:      prometheus
    uid:       prometheus
    url:       http://localhost:9090
    access:    proxy
    isDefault: true
    jsonData:
      timeInterval:        15s
      httpMethod:          POST
      exemplarTraceIdDestinations:
        - name:       traceID
          datasourceUid: tempo

  - name:   Mimir
    type:   prometheus
    uid:    mimir
    url:    http://localhost:9009/prometheus
    access: proxy
    jsonData:
      timeInterval: 15s
      httpMethod:   POST

  - name:   Tempo
    type:   tempo
    uid:    tempo
    url:    http://localhost:3200
    access: proxy
    jsonData:
      httpMethod:      GET
      tracesToLogsV2:
        datasourceUid: prometheus
      serviceMap:
        datasourceUid: prometheus
      lokiSearch:
        datasourceUid: prometheus
      nodeGraph:
        enabled: true
      spanBar:
        type: None

GRAFANAEOF

cat > /cfg/grafana/dashboards/dashboards.yaml << 'DASHPROVEOF'
apiVersion: 1

providers:
  - name: aeroftp
    orgId: 1
    type: file
    disableDeletion: false
    # Grafana polls this directory every 30 s; a re-deployed task picks up
    # a freshly written JSON automatically.
    updateIntervalSeconds: 30
    # Lets you tweak a panel in the UI without the file overwriting it
    # on the next poll.  Export and commit the JSON to persist changes.
    allowUiUpdates: true
    options:
      path: /etc/grafana/provisioning/dashboards
      foldersFromFilesStructure: false

DASHPROVEOF

cat > /cfg/grafana/dashboards/aeroftp.json << 'AEROFTPJSONEOF'
{
  "annotations": {
    "list": []
  },
  "description": "AeroFTP node metrics \u2014 sessions, throughput, file transfers, FTP commands, errors and system resources.",
  "editable": true,
  "fiscalYearStartMonth": 0,
  "graphTooltip": 1,
  "id": null,
  "links": [],
  "panels": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Active Sessions",
      "gridPos": {
        "h": 4,
        "w": 8,
        "x": 0,
        "y": 0
      },
      "datasource": {
        "type": "prometheus",
        "uid": "prometheus"
      },
      "pluginVersion": "10.4.3",
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "value",
        "graphMode": "area",
        "justifyMode": "auto",
        "orientation": "auto",
        "reduceOptions": {
          "calcs": [
            "lastNotNull"
          ],
          "fields": "",
          "values": false
        },
        "textMode": "auto"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "color": {
            "mode": "thresholds"
          },
          "mappings": [],
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "color": "green",
                "value": null
              },
              {
                "color": "yellow",
                "value": 50
              },
              {
                "color": "red",
                "value": 100
              }
            ]
          },
          "unit": "short"
        },
        "overrides": []
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "datasource": {
            "type": "prometheus",
            "uid": "prometheus"
          },
          "refId": "A",
          "expr": "sum(ftp_sessions_total{job=\"aeroftp\"})",
          "instant": true,
          "legendFormat": "__auto"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Instances Up",
      "gridPos": {
        "h": 4,
        "w": 8,
        "x": 8,
        "y": 0
      },
      "datasource": {
        "type": "prometheus",
        "uid": "prometheus"
      },
      "pluginVersion": "10.4.3",
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "value",
        "graphMode": "area",
        "justifyMode": "auto",
        "orientation": "auto",
        "reduceOptions": {
          "calcs": [
            "lastNotNull"
          ],
          "fields": "",
          "values": false
        },
        "textMode": "auto"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "color": {
            "mode": "thresholds"
          },
          "mappings": [],
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "color": "red",
                "value": null
              },
              {
                "color": "yellow",
                "value": 1
              },
              {
                "color": "green",
                "value": 5
              }
            ]
          },
          "unit": "short"
        },
        "overrides": []
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "datasource": {
            "type": "prometheus",
            "uid": "prometheus"
          },
          "refId": "A",
          "expr": "count(up{job=\"aeroftp\"} == 1)",
          "instant": true,
          "legendFormat": "__auto"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Upload Rate",
      "gridPos": {
        "h": 4,
        "w": 8,
        "x": 16,
        "y": 0
      },
      "datasource": {
        "type": "prometheus",
        "uid": "prometheus"
      },
      "pluginVersion": "10.4.3",
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "value",
        "graphMode": "area",
        "justifyMode": "auto",
        "orientation": "auto",
        "reduceOptions": {
          "calcs": [
            "lastNotNull"
          ],
          "fields": "",
          "values": false
        },
        "textMode": "auto"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "color": {
            "mode": "thresholds"
          },
          "mappings": [],

            "mode": "absolute",

            ]
          },

AEROFTPJSONEOF

echo 'Config files written.'
touch /tmp/aeromon-ready

# ── OpenSSH daemon ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# apk runs against the public Alpine mirrors; the task must have outbound
# internet access (public IP or NAT gateway).
apk add --no-cache openssh-server 1>/dev/null

# Generate fresh host keys (ephemeral; update ~/.ssh/known_hosts each run).
ssh-keygen -A -q

mkdir -p /root/.ssh
chmod 700 /root/.ssh

printf 'ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIDMrciGtKUQozFiA/miO85TKw9mRw3mnO8WPPIGc0U36 rommel@md1maxec\n' \
    > /root/.ssh/authorized_keys
chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys

cat > /etc/ssh/sshd_config << 'SSHDEOF'
Port 22
PermitRootLogin prohibit-password
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
PasswordAuthentication no
AllowTcpForwarding yes
GatewayPorts yes
X11Forwarding no
PrintMotd no
LogLevel INFO
SSHDEOF

echo 'Starting sshd ...'
mkdir -p /run/sshd
/usr/sbin/sshd
exec sleep infinity
